commands.TEXTCOUNT: Counts selected TEXT, MTEXT, and ATTRIB values, groups identical strings, reports totals, and exports a timestamped text report.
commands.TEXTSELECT: Filters a mixed selection so only TEXT and MTEXT objects remain selected.
commands.TEXTSUM: Sums numeric values parsed from selected TEXT and MTEXT objects.
commands.TEXTSUMEXPORT: Finds room-type text near square-footage text and exports grouped totals to T24Output.json.
commands.TEXTREPLACE: Replaces the content of selected TEXT and MTEXT objects with a new user-specified value.
commands.TEXTINCREMENT: Renumbers selected TEXT and MTEXT objects using a prefix, start/end range, and odd/even filtering.
commands.TEXTADD: Adds a specified integer value to numbers found inside selected TEXT and MTEXT objects.
